steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The National Heritage Fellowship honors "exceptional folk and traditional artists." The blank describes what Nora Yazzie did that made her worthy of this honor. The word must fit a positive, constructive role in the arts.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — contributions to: describes positive, constructive work that directly qualifies someone for an arts honor. ✓
  • Choice B — doubts about: expressing doubt does not qualify an artist for an honor celebrating exceptional work. ✗
  • Choice C — imitations of: imitating the arts is not a basis for a lifetime achievement fellowship. ✗
  • Choice D — misunderstandings of: misunderstanding the arts contradicts the fellowship's purpose. ✗
That matches Choice A — contributions to.
